question: What issue does #16010 report?
ground_truth: Issue #16010, opened by tiangolo, reports: app.frontend() with fallback="index.html" returns 404 for client side routes that have a dot in the last path segment (like /users/john.doe or /v/1.2.3). ### Discussed in https://github.com/fastapi/fastapi/discussions/15979  <div type='discussions-op-text'>  <sup>Originally posted by **UditDewan** July 12, 2026</sup> ### First Check  - [x] I added a very descriptive title here

question: What issue does #15974 report?
ground_truth: Issue #15974, opened by UditDewan, reports: Race condition in _IncludedRouter cache rebuild can 404 valid routes and permanently corrupt the candidate cache. ### Description  Since the router refactor in 0.137.0 (#15745), `_IncludedRouter.effective_candidates()` and `_IncludedRouter.effective_low_priority_routes()` in `fastapi/routing.py` rebuild their cached lists lazily on first use, with no synchronization
